Metadata.title: Inna | Creatorka — MAC Cards & Guidance
Metadata.description: Express MAC card reading, individual guidance and consultations

About.title: My path
About.item1: Master's degree in Marketing, 16 years in marketing and advertising — from sales manager to Commercial Director of a full-cycle advertising agency. This taught me how to create strong products and turn ideas into real, working projects.
About.item2: For over 10 years I've been exploring self-development and inner transformation. I saw firsthand how beliefs and convictions shape decisions and quality of life. That's why I combined marketing with tools for deep self-discovery.
About.item3: For 2 years, I've been creating original metaphorical associative cards and running individual and group sessions. I help experts and companies create transformational products and professionally package their expertise. When a person understands themselves — they manage life and business with ease.
About.conclusion: My strength — the fusion of deep self-discovery and strategic business thinking.

ExpressAnalysis.title: Your next step
ExpressAnalysis.subtitle: Focus • Resource • Action
ExpressAnalysis.intro: Sometimes one precise insight is enough to see the situation in a new light.
ExpressAnalysis.description: An online express reading with 3 metaphorical cards that will help you:
ExpressAnalysis.benefit1: understand what to focus on right now
ExpressAnalysis.step3: Receive a personal interpretation: Focus • Resource • Action

Services.title: Services
Services.heading: My services
Services.card1Feature1: Individual MAC session: Full immersion into your inquiry (relationships, self-realization, finances, etc.). Uncovering hidden patterns and creating a clear action plan.
Services.card1Feature2: Personal guidance to your goal: Comprehensive work (a series of sessions) to achieve a specific result. Support, state transformation, and methodological guidance at every stage.
Services.card2Feature1: Turnkey MAC concept creation: From idea and metaphor to a finished product.
Services.card2Feature2: Design & visualization (AI-assisted): Custom card decks, notebooks, books, and animations in your unique style.
Services.card2Feature3: Methodological support: Training on working with the tool and developing usage algorithms.
Services.card2Feature4: Implementation consulting: Assistance in launching your own product to market and integrating it into practice.
Services.card3Feature1: Corporate MAC sessions & reviews: Group work for resolving internal issues, stress relief, and finding solutions.
Services.card3Feature2: Custom branded tool development: Creating exclusive card decks and games for internal communications or partner gifts.
Services.card3Feature3: HR program integration: Using MAC in hiring, onboarding, and assessing employee emotional well-being.
Services.card3Feature4: Innovative trainings & workshops: Teaching teams creative thinking through metaphorical tools.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.subtitle: Answers to everything you're curious about
FAQ.q1: What are MAC cards and how do they work?
FAQ.a1: MAC (metaphorical associative cards) are a tool for working with the subconscious through imagery. You intuitively choose cards, and I help interpret their meaning in the context of your inquiry. This is not fortune-telling — it's a structured methodology for self-discovery and decision-making.
FAQ.q2: How does the online express diagnostics work?
FAQ.a2: You pay for access, intuitively choose 3 cards online, and receive a personal interpretation across three dimensions: Focus, Resource, and Action. The whole process takes just a few minutes and is available from any device.
FAQ.a3: No. MAC is a scientifically grounded psychological tool that works with associations and metaphors. The cards help you see your situation from a new angle and find answers that are already within you.
FAQ.q4: What's the difference between express diagnostics and an individual session?
FAQ.a4: Express diagnostics is a quick online format with 3 cards for a specific question. An individual session is deeper one-on-one work where we explore your situation comprehensively using various card decks and techniques.
FAQ.q5: Do you work with companies and teams?
FAQ.a5: Yes! I conduct group MAC sessions for teams, create custom branded tools, integrate methodology into HR programs, and run trainings and workshops. Methodology licensing is also available.
FAQ.a6: Payment is made online through a secure payment system. After payment, you immediately get access to the selected service. If you have any questions about payment — reach out to me on Telegram or Instagram.

ExpressReading.title: Your next step
ExpressReading.subtitle: Focus • Resource • Action
ExpressReading.instruction: Take a deep breath and tune into the present moment. The cards will reveal a message for you right now. When you feel ready — choose three cards:
ExpressReading.step1: First card — Focus: what matters most for you to concentrate on right now
ExpressReading.step2: Second card — Resource: what you already have that will support you
ExpressReading.step3: Third card — Action: the specific step worth taking in the near future
ExpressReading.paymentWait: Please wait, this will take a few seconds
ExpressReading.card1_focus: Find an object on the card that symbolizes your value to others: how much greater is your worth than your fear of being seen?
ExpressReading.card1_resource: Your greatest asset is sincerity. Recall a moment when your mistake became a bridge to others' trust; allow yourself to be real rather than perfect.
ExpressReading.card1_action: Legitimize your state: say aloud or write down: "I'm scared, and that's okay." Once fear is named, it loses its power over you.
ExpressReading.card2_focus: Sense the hidden opportunity you once considered "not for you." What will change in your world when you allow this scale to become part of your life?
ExpressReading.card2_resource: Your strength lies in turning ideas into results. Recall the state of confidence when your actions bore real fruit; this inner algorithm of success already belongs to you.
ExpressReading.card2_action: Materialize your intention: clearly define your next financial goal and take one real step (a call, a proposal, or a calculation), as if success is already a fact.
ExpressReading.card3_focus: What is the price of your forward motion: does your pursuit of results still leave room for humanity and genuine relationships?
ExpressReading.card3_resource: Your strength lies in seeing the goal and overcoming obstacles. Try to transform this drive into leadership that doesn't suppress but inspires others to walk alongside you.
ExpressReading.card3_action: Change the distance: take a step toward someone who seems stronger or more successful. Ask for advice, offer help, or simply start a conversation — turn distance into connection.
ExpressReading.card4_focus: What belongs to your past and what to your future. How much of this forward motion is your conscious choice rather than running from yourself?
ExpressReading.card4_resource: Your strength lies in letting go of what no longer serves you and the courage to step into the unknown. Trust your ability to find footing in the very process of movement, even when the goal is not yet visible.
ExpressReading.card4_action: Do an inventory: write down three things you're ready to leave behind, and one you'll take with you as a talisman. Then take the first real step in a new direction.
ExpressReading.card5_focus: Feel whose burden you're carrying right now: is this guilt truly your own, or have you simply agreed to become a mirror for others' mistakes?
ExpressReading.card5_resource: Your strength lies in the ability to withstand pressure where others give up. Use this resilience not for bearing others' guilt, but for protecting your own boundaries and values.
ExpressReading.card5_action: Return the responsibility: mentally or aloud, say "this is not mine" to whoever tries to make you feel guilty. Take one mindful action that affirms your autonomy and right to your own choice.
ExpressReading.card6_focus: Where does the pressure of circumstances end and your own zone of control begin? What on this card represents your first step toward order, and what is merely background noise you can ignore?
ExpressReading.card6_resource: Your strength lies in the ability to isolate what matters and create order from chaos. Recall a moment when you already untangled complex knots; your analytical experience is your reliable compass.
ExpressReading.card6_action: Choose one "page": do the smallest task that will give you a sense of control. Set everything else aside for 15 minutes and complete this micro-step to reclaim your right to manage the process.
ExpressReading.card7_focus: Look at this metamorphosis: which part of yourself have you already outgrown and are ready to shed, like old skin, to make room for new life?
ExpressReading.card7_resource: Your strength lies in an infinite capacity for renewal. Recall how every past crisis became not a dead end, but a stepping stone to a higher level of understanding.
ExpressReading.card7_action: Symbolize your transition: write down one character trait you're taking into the "updated version" of yourself, and do something today that's atypical for your "former self."
ExpressReading.card8_focus: Look at this difference in scale: which part of your true power do you still consider "too great" or "dangerous" for yourself or others?
ExpressReading.card8_resource: Your anchor is in recognizing that this immense power is already part of you, not something external. Recall a moment when you acted from this scale, and the world became pliable under your intention.
ExpressReading.card8_action: Synchronize the scales: make a physical gesture (breathe in deeply, straighten your shoulders), declare your intention aloud, feeling how your small figure fills with the power of your projection.
ExpressReading.card9_focus: Feel this drive: where is the line between reality and illusory caution? Is the obstacle truly as great as your mind paints it? Perhaps you can handle far more than you think?
ExpressReading.card9_resource: Your asset is the inner child who believes in miracles and doesn't know the word "impossible." Let this spark of adventurism lead you today.
ExpressReading.card9_action: Act preemptively: take the step you considered "too bold" without waiting for the perfect moment — simply trust your impulse.
ExpressReading.card10_focus: Look at this inner pendulum: which two values are competing inside you right now? What in the image suggests a third path that reconciles both sides?
ExpressReading.card10_resource: Your strength lies in critical thinking and depth. Your doubts are not weakness but a safeguard that helps you choose the most mindful path for your soul.
ExpressReading.card10_action: Answer the silence: set a timer for 5 minutes, simply observe your breathing, and write down the first thought that comes without the censorship of your analytical mind.
ExpressReading.card11_focus: Feel the zero point: within this chaos, all possible scenarios of your future are already embedded. Which of these paths resonates in your body with lightness, and which with tension?
ExpressReading.card11_resource: Your anchor is in the inner freedom to choose. You are not obligated to follow a secondary path; your experience allows you to chart your own course right now.
ExpressReading.card11_action: Make a choice at the body level: pick one direction and take three confident steps forward, noticing how your state changes once the decision is already made.
ExpressReading.card12_focus: Assess your inner reservoir: how much energy or material abundance are you ready to receive and hold right now, without trying to immediately get rid of it?
ExpressReading.card12_resource: Your strength lies in patience and the ability to see the bigger picture. Recall the state of abundance when you felt the world was taking care of you; that feeling is your magnet for new opportunities.
ExpressReading.card12_action: Create a vessel for fulfillment: designate a specific place (physical or virtual) for a future resource and make the first deposit that symbolizes your readiness for growth.
ExpressReading.card13_focus: Feel which old belief of yours is literally "bursting at the seams" right now. Are you ready to acknowledge that there is no right answer, and that this gives you complete freedom?
ExpressReading.card13_resource: Your strength lies in the ability to endure uncertainty. Recall a moment when your most brilliant solution was born precisely from a chaos of thoughts.
ExpressReading.card13_action: Take an information pause: turn off all input sources for 10 minutes and write down on paper one or several of the most absurd ideas that come to mind.
ExpressReading.card14_focus: Look at this image: what in it feeds you with energy, and what merely drains your strength? Is this reference point truly your own, or are you simply gazing into someone else's mirror?
ExpressReading.card14_resource: Your asset is imagination. Use it not to escape reality, but to discern the details of the future you are already capable of building.
ExpressReading.card14_action: Run a reality test: take one small physical action that brings your dream closer to the material world (a phone call, a note, buying a symbol).
ExpressReading.card15_focus: Feel this space beyond the threshold: what frightens you more — the unknown or your own future greatness? How ready are you to leave the old room behind?
ExpressReading.card15_resource: Your strength lies in curiosity and an open mind. You already hold the keys to these doors — they are in your ability to see opportunities where others see walls.
ExpressReading.card15_action: Take a step: visit a new place today or start a conversation with someone who could become your guide into this new space.
ExpressReading.card16_focus: Where does your "inner critic" hide? Whose face does it wear, and whose voice does it use to convince you of your imperfection?
ExpressReading.card16_resource: Your resource is high standards. Use this demanding nature not for self-flagellation, but as fuel for growth, while acknowledging the path you've already traveled.
ExpressReading.card16_action: Shift your focus: write down three real achievements from the past week that you dismissed, and thank yourself aloud for each one.
ExpressReading.card17_focus: Feel the temperature of this image: is your fire directed at creation or self-destruction? Which idea are you ready to "ignite" right now?
ExpressReading.card17_resource: Your power lies in an inexhaustible inner source of drive. You are not just fire — you are the sun, capable of warming not only yourself but the people and great projects around you.
ExpressReading.card17_action: Give the fire an outlet: begin the endeavor that makes your "eyes light up," even if it seems illogical, and do it with maximum energy.
ExpressReading.card18_focus: Look at this bond: what dominates here — passion or manipulation? Whose heart are you trying to protect right now, and whose are you trying to conquer at any cost?
ExpressReading.card18_resource: Your strength lies in the depth of your feelings. Your vulnerability is not weakness but a tool for creating genuine closeness without the need for games.
ExpressReading.card18_action: Be candid: admit to yourself or your partner one genuine feeling you've been hiding behind a mask of composure or indifference.
ExpressReading.card19_focus: Feel what you're spending effort on in vain, instead of strengthening what you already have and what has survived.
ExpressReading.card19_resource: Your strength lies in the ability to build a solid foundation. You have already accumulated enough experience and wisdom; your capacity to safeguard what matters most is your guarantee of stability.
ExpressReading.card19_action: Make one firm decision that will stop the losses (financial or emotional), and create a safe reserve that no one else will have access to.
ExpressReading.card20_focus: Feel the connection with your roots: which ancestral belief is nourishing you right now, and which is pulling you down, preventing growth? What from this legacy are you ready to pass on?
ExpressReading.card20_resource: Your strength lies in the experience of thousands of generations behind you. You are not a solitary sprout — you are the crown of a tree that has already weathered every storm.
ExpressReading.card20_action: Honor the source: recall an ancestor whose trait you admire most, and throughout the day act as though that quality is activated in you at 100%.
ExpressReading.card21_focus: Where is your boundary between submission and a conscious decision to accept circumstances in order to gather strength for a breakthrough?
ExpressReading.card21_resource: Your anchor is in inner resilience. True willpower often looks like calm; your ability to wait for the right moment is a strategic advantage.
ExpressReading.card21_action: Take a pause: consciously stop fighting where it only exhausts you, and redirect that energy toward strengthening your inner center.
ExpressReading.card22_focus: Look at the circle of participants: whose voice sounds loudest in this conversation — your own, or the echo of others' expectations and ancestral scripts?
ExpressReading.card22_resource: Your strength lies in diplomacy and the ability to listen. You are capable of finding a solution that honors the system's interests without losing your individuality.
ExpressReading.card22_action: Open a dialogue: initiate an honest conversation or simply state your position clearly to those whose opinion influences you, establishing new rules of the game if new circumstances demand it.
ExpressReading.card23_focus: Look through the rubble: what among the things that collapsed was actually preventing you from seeing the real path? What truth has finally become visible?
ExpressReading.card23_resource: Your asset is honesty with yourself. The destruction of illusions releases an enormous amount of energy you previously spent maintaining a fictional world.
ExpressReading.card23_action: Accept the fact: acknowledge one real situation as it truly is, without embellishment, and take the first step standing on the solid ground of facts.
ExpressReading.card24_focus: Feel the point where you stand: are you closing an old cycle or already opening a new one? What on this card symbolizes your faithfulness to yourself?
ExpressReading.card24_resource: Your strength lies in the ability to complete cycles and take responsibility. The promises you've made to yourself carry the greatest weight and energy.
ExpressReading.card24_action: Mark the milestone: make a symbolic gesture (a gift to yourself or completing a task) that confirms the end of an old chapter or your entry into a new agreement with life.
ExpressReading.card25_focus: Assess the scales of your balance: where is the tilt right now — toward excessive pragmatism or ignoring earthly needs? What will help you connect these two worlds?
ExpressReading.card25_resource: Your uniqueness lies in the ability to be whole. You can simultaneously stand firmly on the ground and reach for higher meaning; these two vectors don't contradict — they nourish each other.
ExpressReading.card25_action: Create balance: take one action for the comfort of your body and one for the nourishment of your soul, feeling how they harmonize within your day.
ExpressReading.card26_focus: Feel this pressure from above: is this truly the limit of your capabilities, or have you simply grown accustomed to walking with a bowed head? What on the card points to a way out into a space without borders?
ExpressReading.card26_resource: Your strength lies in your stature, which has outgrown your current circumstances. You are already too large for this format; your inner constriction is a signal of inevitable expansion.
ExpressReading.card26_action: Stand tall: take one action that goes beyond the limits of your usual "allowed," and anchor the feeling of freedom when you finally permit yourself to occupy all available space.
ExpressReading.card27_focus: Look at your throne: what holds it up — your inner dignity or the desire to prove something to others? How confident do you feel in your own power?
ExpressReading.card27_resource: Your anchor is in the right to govern your life by your own rules. You already have the status and wisdom; your ability to make decisions without seeking approval is your chief scepter.
ExpressReading.card27_action: Assert your will: give yourself an "order" to complete the task that demands your authority, and carry it out with a full sense of the legitimacy of your power.
ExpressReading.card28_focus: Feel the pause: what on this card symbolizes a complete disconnection from the system? How much do you allow yourself to simply be, without justifying your presence through usefulness or action?
ExpressReading.card28_resource: Your strength lies in silence and the capacity for renewal. Rest is not weakness but a strategic accumulation of energy; your emptiness right now is space for future ideas.
ExpressReading.card28_action: Switch off the power: create one hour of complete isolation from tasks and gadgets for yourself, focusing only on bodily sensations and restoring your inner rhythm.
ExpressReading.card29_focus: Look at what's left behind: is this emptiness your loss or your liberation? What on the card gives you the impulse to move forward when there's nothing left to lose?
ExpressReading.card29_resource: Your power lies in total freedom and an indomitable spirit. When everything external is destroyed, what is indestructible within you becomes visible; your survival experience is your sole and most precious capital.
ExpressReading.card29_action: Start from zero: take the first step in a new direction, letting go of regret for the past, and act as if the entire world is an open field for your new story.
ExpressReading.card30_focus: Find the source of your discomfort on the card: whose dissatisfaction are you feeling right now — your own, or an echo of societal standards that are impossible to meet?
ExpressReading.card30_resource: Your strength lies in your imperfection and humanity. Refusing the role of "the perfect one" gives you the right to be authentic; your vulnerability makes your connections alive, not mechanical.
ExpressReading.card30_action: Show self-compassion: write down one thing you punish yourself for, and consciously allow yourself to be "not good enough" at it today, making room for simple self-love.
ExpressReading.card31_focus: Feel the distance to the goal: what stops you a moment before victory — fear of disappointment or fear of responsibility for your own success? How ready are you for everything to work out?
ExpressReading.card31_resource: Your anchor is in the path you've already traveled. You've already taken 99 out of 100 steps; your ability to endure the final tension before triumph is your key advantage.
ExpressReading.card31_action: Push through: make the one decisive effort you previously lacked the courage for, and cross the finish line without looking back.
ExpressReading.card32_focus: Look at the space between you: what holds this alliance together — a shared goal or mutual dependence? How ready are you to share not only the outcome but also vulnerability along this path?
ExpressReading.card32_resource: Your strength lies in resonance and support. Together you are more than the sum of your parts; your ability to trust and delegate multiplies your possibilities exponentially.
ExpressReading.card32_action: Strengthen the bond: sincerely thank your partner for the shared experience and discuss one joint step you will take in sync, amplifying each other.
